page.title: Packaging inventory
page.subtitle: Catalog the materials you actually use to ship: boxes, tapes, void fillers. We'll use them to calculate the EPR weight of every order.

warnings.missing_categories_body: You haven't added: {{categories}}. Without them, parcel weight in your EPR reports may be incomplete.

empty_state.heading: Your packaging inventory is empty
empty_state.body: Add the boxes, tape and void fillers you use to ship. It only takes a few minutes to get started.

ai_section.subtitle: We analysed your catalog and suggested a few packaging options. Review them and accept the ones you actually use.

modal.no_types_for_category: No templates available for this category. Create a custom packaging below.

form.name_help: Use a name you'll recognize: you'll match products against it.
form.custom_gsm_help: Leave empty to use the material's default grammage.
form.custom_static_weight_g_help: Leave empty to use the material's default unit weight.

toasts.load_failed: We couldn't load your inventory. Refresh the page.
toasts.save_failed: We couldn't save your changes. Check the fields and try again.
toasts.delete_failed: Delete didn't go through. Please try again.
toasts.suggestion_accepted: Suggestion accepted and added to inventory.
